title: schultesianthus leucanthus
intro: Schultesianthus leucanthus, also known as the Schultesianthus plant, is a type of flowering plant native to South America. It is a shrub-like plant with medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots. The Schultesianthus plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic properties. Schultesianthus leucanthus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal benefits, which include reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting overall well-being.
